svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="门禁从compile升级到verify" id="compileVerifyUpgrade1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="g_old" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="旧门禁（被淘汰）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="240" x="40" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old_trigger" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="开发者 / AI 提交改动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="180" x="70" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old_compile" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="mvn compile
只校验语法契约
类型 / 签名 / 引用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="180" x="70" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="old_result" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="❌ 绿灯放行
并发守卫 / 行为被静默删除" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="70" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_old1" edge="1" parent="1" source="old_trigger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="old_compile" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_old2" edge="1" parent="1" source="old_compile" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="old_result" value="语法没问题"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_new" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="新门禁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="800" x="340" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new_trigger" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="开发者 / AI 提交改动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="180" x="650" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new_verify" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="mvn verify
提交前置门禁（Proof-of-Work）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="590" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="分层测试 UT / IT / E2E
并发路径、锁顺序、幂等键" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="370" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="契约扫描
路由注解 / 权限 key / 限流策略" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="630" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="layer3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="E2E 兜底
真实链路再拦一道" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="220" x="890" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ok" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="三层全绿 → 允许提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="450" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;dashed=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="❌ 任一红 → 拦截提交" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="220" x="810" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_new1" edge="1" parent="1" source="new_trigger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="new_verify" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_v1" edge="1" parent="1" source="new_verify" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="layer1" value="①"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_v2" edge="1" parent="1" source="new_verify" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="layer2" value="②"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_v3" edge="1" parent="1" source="new_verify" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="layer3" value="③"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_ok" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ok" value="全绿"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_fail" edge="1" parent="1" source="layer3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="fail" value="任一红"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_cross" edge="1" parent="1" source="old_compile" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#94a3b8;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=10;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="new_verify" value="替换"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
